On RTX 4090, end-to-end generation time is reduced by 75%, and a single RTX 4090 can generate videos within \u003cstrong\u003e75 seconds\u003c/strong\u003e. The step-distilled model maintains comparable quality to the original model while achieving significant speedup. See \u003ca href=\"/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/step_distillation_comparison.md\"\u003eStep Distillation Comparison\u003c/a\u003e for detailed quality comparisons. For even faster generation, you can also try 4 steps (faster speed with slightly reduced quality). \u003cstrong\u003eTo enable the step-distilled model, run \u003ccode\u003egenerate.py\u003c/code\u003e with the \u003ccode\u003e--enable_step_distill\u003c/code\u003e parameter.\u003c/strong\u003e See \u003ca href=\"#-usage\"\u003eUsage\u003c/a\u003e for detailed usage instructions. 🔥🔥🔥🆕\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e📚 Dec 05, 2025: \u003cstrong\u003eTraining Code \u0026amp; LoRA Tuning Script Released\u003c/strong\u003e: We now open-source the training code for HunyuanVideo-1.5! The training script (\u003ccode\u003etrain.py\u003c/code\u003e) provides a full training pipeline with support for distributed training, FSDP, context parallel, gradient checkpointing, and more. HunyuanVideo-1.5 is trained using the Muon optimizer, which we have open-sourced in the \u003ca href=\"#-training\"\u003eTraining\u003c/a\u003e section. \u003cstrong\u003eIf you would like to continue training our model or fine-tune it with LoRA, please use the Muon optimizer.\u003c/strong\u003e See \u003ca href=\"#-training\"\u003eTraining\u003c/a\u003e section for detailed usage instructions. 🔥🔥🔥🆕\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🎉 \u003cstrong\u003eDiffusers Support\u003c/strong\u003e: HunyuanVideo-1.5 is now available on Hugging Face Diffusers! Check out \u003ca href=\"https://huggingface.co/collections/hunyuanvideo-community/hunyuanvideo-15\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eDiffusers collection\u003c/a\u003e for easy integration. 🔥🔥🔥🆕\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🚀 Nov 27, 2025: We now support cache inference (deepcache, teacache, taylorcache), achieving significant speedup! Pull the latest code to try it.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🚀 Nov 24, 2025: We now support deepcache inference.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e👋 Nov 20, 2025: We release the inference code and model ComfyUI supports HunyuanVideo-1.5 with various engineering optimizations for fast inference. We provide a \u003ca href=\"/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/ComfyUI/README.md\"\u003eComfyUI Usage Guide\u003c/a\u003e for HunyuanVideo-1.5.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCommunity-implemented ComfyUI Plugin\u003c/strong\u003e - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/yuanyuan-spec/comfyui_hunyuanvideo_1.5_plugin\"\u003ecomfyui_hunyuanvideo_1.5_plugin\u003c/a\u003e: A community-implemented ComfyUI plugin for HunyuanVideo-1.5, offering both simplified and complete node sets for quick usage or deep workflow customization, with built-in automatic model download support.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eLightX2V\u003c/strong\u003e - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/ModelTC/LightX2V\"\u003eLightX2V\u003c/a\u003e: A lightweight and efficient video generation framework that integrates HunyuanVideo-1.5, supporting multiple engineering acceleration techniques for fast inference.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWan2GP v9.62\u003c/strong\u003e - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/deepbeepmeep/Wan2GP\"\u003eWan2GP\u003c/a\u003e: WanGP is a very low VRAM app (as low 6 GB of VRAM for Hunyuan Video 1.5) supports Lora Accelerator for a 8 steps generation and offers tools to facilitate Video Generation.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eComfyUI-MagCache\u003c/strong\u003e - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/Zehong-Ma/ComfyUI-MagCache\"\u003eComfyUI-MagCache\u003c/a\u003e: MagCache is a training-free caching approach that accelerates video generation by estimating fluctuating differences among model outputs across timesteps. It achieves 1.7x speedup for HunyuanVideo-1.5 with 20 inference steps.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eOmniWeaving\u003c/strong\u003e - \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/OmniWeaving\"\u003eOmniWeaving\u003c/a\u003e: An omni-level unified video generation model built upon HunyuanVideo-1.5, excelling in free-form multimodal composition and reasoning-augmented generation. Specifically, it seamlessly handles a diverse array of tasks, such as Text-to-Video, First-Frame-to-Video, Key-Frames-to-Video, Video-to-Video Editing, Reference-to-Video, Compositional Multi-Image-to-Video, and Text-Image-Video-to-Video.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" href=\"#-introduction\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWe present HunyuanVideo-1.5, a lightweight yet powerful video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art visual quality and motion coherence with only 8.3 billion parameters, enabling efficient inference on consumer-grade GPUs. This achievement is built upon several key components, including meticulous data curation, an advanced DiT architecture with selective and sliding tile attention(SSTA), enhanced bilingual understanding through glyph-aware text encoding, progressive pre-training and post-training, and an efficient video super-resolution network. Leveraging these designs, we developed a unified framework capable of high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video generation across multiple durations and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this compact and proficient model establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source models. By releasing the code and weights of HunyuanVideo-1.5, we provide the community with a high-performance foundation that significantly lowers the cost of video creation and research, making advanced video generation more accessible to all.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e✨ Key Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--key-features\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: ✨ Key Features\" href=\"#-key-features\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cstrong\u003eLightweight High-Performance Architecture\u003c/strong\u003e: We propose an efficient architecture that integrates an 8.3B-parameter Diffusion Transformer (DiT) with a 3D causal VAE, achieving compression ratios of 16× in spatial dimensions and 4× along the temporal axis. Additionally, the innovative SSTA (Selective and Sliding Tile Attention) mechanism prunes redundant spatiotemporal kv blocks, significantly reducing computational overhead for long video sequences and accelerates inference, achieving an end-to-end speedup of \u003cmath-renderer class=\"js-inline-math\" style=\"display: inline-block\" data-run-id=\"49c8c72d9aa5bb72f58713da85a9b959\"\u003e$1.87 \\times$\u003c/math-renderer\u003e in 10-second 720p video synthesis compared to FlashAttention-3.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv align=\"center\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003ca target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" href=\"/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_dit.png\"\u003e\u003cimg src=\"/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/raw/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_dit.png\" alt=\"HunyuanVideo-1.5 DiT\" width=\"600\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e \n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eVideo Super-Resolution Enhancement\u003c/strong\u003e: We develop an efficient few-step super-resolution network that upscales outputs to 1080p. It enhances sharpness while correcting distortions, thereby refining details and overall visual texture.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv align=\"center\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003ca target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" href=\"/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_vsr.png\"\u003e\u003cimg src=\"/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/raw/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_vsr.png\" alt=\"HunyuanVideo-1.5 VSR\" width=\"600\" style=\"max-width: 100%;\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e \n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEnd-to-End Training Optimization\u003c/strong\u003e: This work employs a multi-stage, progressive training strategy covering the entire pipeline from pre-training to post-training. Combined with the Muon optimizer to accelerate convergence, this approach holistically refines motion coherence, aesthetic quality, and human preference alignment, achieving professional-grade content generation.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e📜 System By writing longer and more detailed prompts, the generated video will be significantly improved. We encourage you to craft comprehensive and descriptive prompts to achieve the best possible video quality. We recommend community partners consulting our official guide on how to write effective prompts.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eReference:\u003c/strong\u003e \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/HunyuanVideo_1_5_Prompt_Handbook_EN.md\"\u003eHunyuanVideo-1.5 Prompt Handbook\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eSystem Prompts for Automatic Prompt Enhancement\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-system-prompts-for-automatic-prompt-enhancement\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: System Prompts for Automatic Prompt Enhancement\" href=\"#system-prompts-for-automatic-prompt-enhancement\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eFor users seeking to optimize prompts for other large models, it is recommended to consult the definition of \u003ccode\u003et2v_rewrite_system_prompt\u003c/code\u003e in the file \u003ccode\u003ehyvideo/utils/rewrite/t2v_prompt.py\u003c/code\u003e to guide text-to-video rewriting. Similarly, for image-to-video rewriting, refer to the definition of \u003ccode\u003ei2v_rewrite_system_prompt\u003c/code\u003e in \u003ccode\u003ehyvideo/utils/rewrite/i2v_prompt.py\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eFor prompt rewriting, we recommend using Gemini or models deployed via vLLM. This codebase currently only supports models compatible with the vLLM API. If you wish to use Gemini, you will need to implement your own interface calls.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eFor models with a vLLM API, note that T2V (text-to-video) and I2V (image-to-video) have different recommended models and environment variables:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eT2V: use \u003ca href=\"https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eQwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507\u003c/a\u003e, configure \u003ccode\u003eT2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eT2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eI2V: use \u003ca href=\"https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eQwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct\u003c/a\u003e, configure \u003ccode\u003eI2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eI2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eYou may set the above model names to any other vLLM-compatible models you have deployed (including HuggingFace models).\u003cbr\u003e\nRewriting is enabled by default (\u003ccode\u003e--rewrite\u003c/code\u003e defaults to \u003ccode\u003etrue\u003c/code\u003e); to disable it explicitly, use \u003ccode\u003e--rewrite false\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--rewrite 0\u003c/code\u003e. If no vLLM endpoint is configured, the pipeline runs without remote rewriting.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eExample: Generate a video (works for both T2V and I2V; set \u003ccode\u003eIMAGE_PATH=none\u003c/code\u003e for T2V or provide an image path for I2V)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e💡 \u003cstrong\u003eTip\u003c/strong\u003e: For faster inference speed, you can enable the step-distilled model using the \u003ccode\u003e--enable_step_distill\u003c/code\u003e parameter. The step-distilled model (480p I2V) can generate videos in 8 or 12 steps (recommended), achieving up to 75% speedup on RTX 4090 while maintaining comparable quality.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eTips:\u003c/strong\u003e If your GPU memory is \u0026gt; 14GB but you encounter OOM (Out of Memory) errors during generation, you can try setting the following environment variable before running:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"export PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True,max_split_size_mb:128\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexport\u003c/span\u003e PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True,max_split_size_mb:128\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eTips:\u003c/strong\u003e If you have limited CPU memory and encounter OOM during inference, you can try disable overlapped group offloading by adding the following argument:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"--overlap_group_offloading false\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e--overlap_group_offloading \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"export T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=\u0026quot;\u0026lt;your_vllm_server_base_url\u0026gt;\u0026quot;\nexport T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=\u0026quot;\u0026lt;your_model_name\u0026gt;\u0026quot;\nexport I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=\u0026quot;\u0026lt;your_vllm_server_base_url\u0026gt;\u0026quot;\nexport I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=\u0026quot;\u0026lt;your_model_name\u0026gt;\u0026quot;\n\nPROMPT='A girl holding a paper with words \u0026quot;Hello, world!\u0026quot;'\n\nIMAGE_PATH=/path/to/image.png # Optional, none or \u0026lt;image path\u0026gt; to enable i2v mode\nSEED=1\nASPECT_RATIO=16:9\nRESOLUTION=480p\nOUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/output.mp4\nMODEL_PATH=./ckpts # Path to pretrained model\n\n# Configuration for faster inference\nN_INFERENCE_GPU=8 # Parallel inference GPU count\nCFG_DISTILLED=true # Inference with CFG distilled model, 2x speedup\nSAGE_ATTN=true # Inference with SageAttention\nSPARSE_ATTN=false # Inference with sparse attention (only 720p models are equipped with sparse attention). Please ensure flex-block-attn is installed\nOVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=true # Only valid when group offloading is enabled, significantly increases CPU memory usage but speeds up inference\nENABLE_CACHE=true # Enable feature cache during inference. Significantly speeds up inference.\nCACHE_TYPE=deepcache # Support: deepcache, teacache, taylorcache\nENABLE_STEP_DISTILL=true # Enable step distilled model for 480p I2V, recommended 8 or 12 steps, up to 6x speedup\n\n\n# Configuration for better quality\nREWRITE=true # Enable prompt rewriting. Please ensure rewrite vLLM server is deployed and configured.\nENABLE_SR=true # Enable super resolution\n\n\ntorchrun --nproc_per_node=$N_INFERENCE_GPU generate.py \\\n  --prompt \u0026quot;$PROMPT\u0026quot; \\\n  --image_path $IMAGE_PATH \\\n  --resolution $RESOLUTION \\\n  --aspect_ratio $ASPECT_RATIO \\\n  --seed $SEED \\\n  --rewrite $REWRITE \\\n  --cfg_distilled $CFG_DISTILLED \\\n  --enable_step_distill $ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL \\\n  --sparse_attn $SPARSE_ATTN --use_sageattn $SAGE_ATTN \\\n  --enable_cache $ENABLE_CACHE --cache_type $CACHE_TYPE \\\n  --overlap_group_offloading $OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING \\\n  --sr $ENABLE_SR --save_pre_sr_video \\\n  --output_path $OUTPUT_PATH \\\n  --model_path $MODEL_PATH\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexport\u003c/span\u003e T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;your_vllm_server_base_url\u0026gt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexport\u003c/span\u003e T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;your_model_name\u0026gt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexport\u003c/span\u003e I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;your_vllm_server_base_url\u0026gt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexport\u003c/span\u003e I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;your_model_name\u0026gt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\nPROMPT=\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e'\u003c/span\u003eA girl holding a paper with words \"Hello, world!\"\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e'\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\nIMAGE_PATH=/path/to/image.png \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Optional, none or \u0026lt;image path\u0026gt; to enable i2v mode\u003c/span\u003e\nSEED=1\nASPECT_RATIO=16:9\nRESOLUTION=480p\nOUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/output.mp4\nMODEL_PATH=./ckpts \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Path to pretrained model\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Configuration for faster inference\u003c/span\u003e\nN_INFERENCE_GPU=8 \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Parallel inference GPU count\u003c/span\u003e\nCFG_DISTILLED=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Inference with CFG distilled model, 2x speedup\u003c/span\u003e\nSAGE_ATTN=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Inference with SageAttention\u003c/span\u003e\nSPARSE_ATTN=false \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Inference with sparse attention (only 720p models are equipped with sparse attention). Please ensure flex-block-attn is installed\u003c/span\u003e\nOVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Only valid when group offloading is enabled, significantly increases CPU memory usage but speeds up inference\u003c/span\u003e\nENABLE_CACHE=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Enable feature cache during inference. Significantly speeds up inference.\u003c/span\u003e\nCACHE_TYPE=deepcache \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Support: deepcache, teacache, taylorcache\u003c/span\u003e\nENABLE_STEP_DISTILL=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Enable step distilled model for 480p I2V, recommended 8 or 12 steps, up to 6x speedup\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Configuration for better quality\u003c/span\u003e\nREWRITE=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Enable prompt rewriting. Please ensure rewrite vLLM server is deployed and configured.\u003c/span\u003e\nENABLE_SR=true \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e#\u003c/span\u003e Enable super resolution\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\ntorchrun --nproc_per_node=\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$N_INFERENCE_GPU\u003c/span\u003e generate.py \\\n  --prompt \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$PROMPT\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --image_path \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$IMAGE_PATH\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --resolution \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$RESOLUTION\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --aspect_ratio \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$ASPECT_RATIO\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --seed \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$SEED\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --rewrite \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$REWRITE\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --cfg_distilled \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$CFG_DISTILLED\u003c/span\u003e \\\n  --enable_step_distill \u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003e$ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL\u003c/span\u003e \\\n true\u003c/code\u003e to enable)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003e--sparse_attn\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ebool\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNo\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003efalse\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEnable true\u003c/code\u003e to enable)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003e--offloading\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ebool\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNo\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003etrue\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEnable allows)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003e--group_offloading\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ebool\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNo\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eNone\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEnable group offloading (default: None, automatically enabled if offloading is enabled. Use \u003ccode\u003e--group_offloading\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--group_offloading true/1\u003c/code\u003e to enable, \u003ccode\u003e--group_offloading false/0\u003c/code\u003e to disable)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003e--overlap_group_offloading\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ebool\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNo\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003etrue\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEnable overlap group offloading (default: true). Use \u003ccode\u003e--overlap_group_offloading\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--overlap_group_offloading true/1\u003c/code\u003e to enable, \u003ccode\u003e--overlap_group_offloading The Muon optimizer combines momentum-based updates with Newton-Schulz orthogonalization for efficient optimization of large-scale video generation models.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eQuick Start\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-quick-start\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Quick Start\" href=\"#quick-start\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe training script (\u003ccode\u003etrain.py\u003c/code\u003e) provides a complete training pipeline for HunyuanVideo-1.5. the relative performance of two models based on overall video perception quality.We carefully construct 300 diverse text prompts and 300 image samples to cover balanced application scenarios for both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks. For each prompt or image input, an equal number of video samples are generated by each model in a single run to ensure comparability. To maintain fairness, inference is performed only once per input without any cherry-picking of results. All competing models are evaluated using their default configurations. The evaluation is conducted by over 100 professional assessors\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv align=\"center\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003ca target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" \u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003e📋 Show rewrite prompt\u003c/summary\u003e \u003ccode\u003e一座空旷的现代阁楼里，有一张铺展在地板中央的建筑蓝图。忽然间，图纸上的线条泛起微光，仿佛被某种无形的力量唤醒。紧接着，那些发光的线条开始向上延伸，从平面中挣脱，勾勒出立体的轮廓——就像在空中进行一场无声的3D打印。随后，奇迹在加速发生：极简的橡木办公桌、优雅的伊姆斯风格皮质椅、高挑的工业风金属书架，还有几盏爱迪生灯泡，以光纹为骨架迅速“生长”出来。转瞬间，线条被真实的材质填充——木材的温润、皮革的质感、金属的冷静，都在眨眼间完整呈现。最终，所有家具稳固落地，蓝图的光芒悄然褪去。一个完整的办公空间，就这样从二维的图纸中诞生。\u003c/code\u003e The main leaf, a vibrant, deep green, is positioned diagonally across the frame. Its surface is covered in tiny, glistening spherical dewdrops that catch and refract the bright morning sunlight, creating sparkling highlights. Initially, a larger, perfectly round dewdrop clings to the upper section of the leaf, its surface tension holding it in place. Then, as the leaf sways almost imperceptibly, the dewdrop begins to slowly dislodge. Next, it starts to trickle down the central vein of the leaf, its shape elongating slightly as it moves, leaving a subtle, glistening wet trail in its path. Finally, it reaches the pointed tip of the leaf, hangs for a brief moment, and falls out of the bottom of the frame. In the background, other leaves and blades of grass are softly blurred, creating a beautiful bokeh effect with soft, out-of-focus circles of light. The environment is bathed in the warm, golden glow of early morning sunlight, which streams in from behind the leaves, backlighting them and causing their wet edges to shine brilliantly. The overall impression is one of serene, natural beauty, captured in a highly realistic and detailed manner. This is a macro shot. The camera tilts down very slowly, following the path of the main dewdrop as it travels down the leaf. The lighting is soft and natural, with strong backlighting to create a radiant, glowing effect on the dewdrops and leaf edges, characteristic of professional nature photography. The atmosphere is peaceful and serene. After that, he raises his right hand again, breaks off another piece of cake from his right arm, and repeats the action of bringing it to his mouth to chew.\u003c/code\u003e \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cdetails open=\"\" class=\"details-reset border rounded-2\"\u003e\n  \u003csummary class=\"tmp-px-3 py-2\"\u003e\n    \u003csvg aria-hidden=\"true\" data-component=\"Octicon\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" data-view-component=\"true\" class=\"octicon octicon-device-camera-video\"\u003e\n    \u003cpath d=\"M16 3.75v8.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.136.643L11 10.575v.675A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 13h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 11.25v-6.5C0 3.784.784 3 1.75 3h7.5c.966 0 1.75.784 1.75 1.75v.675l3.864-2.318A.75.75 0 0 1 16 3.75Zm-6.5 1a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25h-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v6.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-6.5ZM11 8.825l3.5 2.1v-5.85l-3.5 2.1Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\n\u003c/svg\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"m-1\"\u003eMS_2.mp4\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"dropdown-caret\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003c/summary\u003e\n\n  \u003cvideo src=\"https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/18069771/517169951-de5f7480-b79c-4fc1-b345-c5880a3b5f9e.mp4?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8ZqApcX1fVZ9J9UsLxpXR66jYDFaTU4eUp2Ama0TL3E\" data-canonical-src=\"https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/18069771/517169951-de5f7480-b79c-4fc1-b345-c5880a3b5f9e.mp4?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8ZqApcX1fVZ9J9UsLxpXR66jYDFaTU4eUp2Ama0TL3E\" controls=\"controls\" muted=\"muted\" class=\"d-block rounded-bottom-2 border-top width-fit\" style=\"max-height:640px; min-height: 200px\"\u003e\n\n  \u003c/video\u003e\n\u003c/details\u003e\n \u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003e📋 Show input prompt\u003c/summary\u003e \u003ccode\u003eA little girl, carrying a colorful handbag, skips through the garden.  The video uses claymation style.\u003c/code\u003e \u003c/details\u003e \u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003e📋 Show rewrite prompt\u003c/summary\u003e \u003ccode\u003eA little girl with a colorful handbag skips through a whimsical claymation garden. In a vibrant garden constructed entirely from clay, a young girl, meticulously crafted in a claymation style, skips joyfully. She has chunky, sculpted yellow clay hair tied in pigtails that bounce with a slight stiffness, simple black button eyes, and a wide, permanently etched smile. She wears a simple pink clay dress with a white collar. In her left hand, she carries a small handbag molded from bright red and blue clay, which swings in a slightly jerky arc as she moves. Initially, the girl lifts her right leg high, her body momentarily suspended in a classic stop-motion pose. Then, she hops forward, landing lightly as her left leg swings through for the next skip. Her arms move in an exaggerated, back-and-forth rhythm, characteristic of stop-motion animation. Her movements are intentionally not perfectly fluid, highlighting the frame-by-frame nature of the claymation technique. The garden around her is a whimsical, textured world. In the foreground and mid-ground, oversized flowers with swirled purple and orange petals stand on thick green stems. The ground is a textured mat of green clay, showing subtle fingerprints and tool marks that add to the handmade charm. In the background, a pale blue clay backdrop features a simplified, smiling sun molded from yellow clay. The shot is at an eye-level angle with the main subject. The camera follows the subject, moving smoothly to the right to keep her in the frame. The lighting is bright and even, casting soft shadows that emphasize the rounded, three-dimensional forms of the clay models. The overall video presents a charming and detailed claymation style.\u003c/code\u003e \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHigh Image-Video <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🎬 HunyuanVideo-1.5: A leading lightweight video generation model</h1><a id="user-content--hunyuanvideo-15-a-leading-lightweight-video-generation-model" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🎬 HunyuanVideo-1.5: A leading lightweight video generation model" href="#-hunyuanvideo-15-a-leading-lightweight-video-generation-model"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div align="center" dir="auto">

</div>
<p dir="auto">HunyuanVideo-1.5 is a video generation model that delivers top-tier quality with only 8.3B parameters, significantly lowering the barrier to usage. It runs smoothly on consumer-grade GPUs, making it accessible for every developer and creator. This repository provides the implementation and tools needed to generate creative videos.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔥🔥🔥 News</h2><a id="user-content--news" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔥🔥🔥 News" href="#-news"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>🚀 Dec 23, 2025: Fp8 gemm inference is supported! 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>🚀 Dec 05, 2025: <strong>New Release</strong>: We now release the <a href="https://huggingface.co/tencent/HunyuanVideo-1.5/tree/main/transformer/480p_i2v_step_distilled" rel="nofollow">480p I2V step-distilled model</a>, which generates videos in 8 or 12 steps (recommended)! On RTX 4090, end-to-end generation time is reduced by 75%, and a single RTX 4090 can generate videos within <strong>75 seconds</strong>. The step-distilled model maintains comparable quality to the original model while achieving significant speedup. See <a href="/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/step_distillation_comparison.md">Step Distillation Comparison</a> for detailed quality comparisons. For even faster generation, you can also try 4 steps (faster speed with slightly reduced quality). <strong>To enable the step-distilled model, run <code>generate.py</code> with the <code>--enable_step_distill</code> parameter.</strong> See <a href="#-usage">Usage</a> for detailed usage instructions. 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>📚 Dec 05, 2025: <strong>Training Code & LoRA Tuning Script Released</strong>: We now open-source the training code for HunyuanVideo-1.5! The training script (<code>train.py</code>) provides a full training pipeline with support for distributed training, FSDP, context parallel, gradient checkpointing, and more. HunyuanVideo-1.5 is trained using the Muon optimizer, which we have open-sourced in the <a href="#-training">Training</a> section. <strong>If you would like to continue training our model or fine-tune it with LoRA, please use the Muon optimizer.</strong> See <a href="#-training">Training</a> section for detailed usage instructions. 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>🎉 <strong>Diffusers Support</strong>: HunyuanVideo-1.5 is now available on Hugging Face Diffusers! Check out <a href="https://huggingface.co/collections/hunyuanvideo-community/hunyuanvideo-15" rel="nofollow">Diffusers collection</a> for easy integration. 🔥🔥🔥🆕</li>
<li>🚀 Nov 27, 2025: We now support cache inference (deepcache, teacache, taylorcache), achieving significant speedup! Pull the latest code to try it.</li>
<li>🚀 Nov 24, 2025: We now support deepcache inference.</li>
<li>👋 Nov 20, 2025: We release the inference code and model weights of HunyuanVideo-1.5.</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🧩 Community Contributions</h2><a id="user-content--community-contributions" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🧩 Community Contributions" href="#-community-contributions"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you develop/use HunyuanVideo-1.5 in your projects, welcome to let us know.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Diffusers</strong> - <a href="https://huggingface.co/collections/hunyuanvideo-community/hunyuanvideo-15" rel="nofollow">HunyuanVideo-1.5 Diffusers</a>: Official Hugging Face Diffusers integration for HunyuanVideo-1.5. Easily use HunyuanVideo-1.5 with the Diffusers library for seamless integration into your projects. See <a href="#usage-with-diffusers">Usage with Diffusers</a> section for details.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>ComfyUI</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI">ComfyUI</a>: A powerful and modular diffusion model GUI with a graph/nodes interface. ComfyUI supports HunyuanVideo-1.5 with various engineering optimizations for fast inference. We provide a <a href="/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/ComfyUI/README.md">ComfyUI Usage Guide</a> for HunyuanVideo-1.5.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Community-implemented ComfyUI Plugin</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/yuanyuan-spec/comfyui_hunyuanvideo_1.5_plugin">comfyui_hunyuanvideo_1.5_plugin</a>: A community-implemented ComfyUI plugin for HunyuanVideo-1.5, offering both simplified and complete node sets for quick usage or deep workflow customization, with built-in automatic model download support.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>LightX2V</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/ModelTC/LightX2V">LightX2V</a>: A lightweight and efficient video generation framework that integrates HunyuanVideo-1.5, supporting multiple engineering acceleration techniques for fast inference.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Wan2GP v9.62</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/deepbeepmeep/Wan2GP">Wan2GP</a>: WanGP is a very low VRAM app (as low 6 GB of VRAM for Hunyuan Video 1.5) supports Lora Accelerator for a 8 steps generation and offers tools to facilitate Video Generation.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>ComfyUI-MagCache</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/Zehong-Ma/ComfyUI-MagCache">ComfyUI-MagCache</a>: MagCache is a training-free caching approach that accelerates video generation by estimating fluctuating differences among model outputs across timesteps. It achieves 1.7x speedup for HunyuanVideo-1.5 with 20 inference steps.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>OmniWeaving</strong> - <a href="https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/OmniWeaving">OmniWeaving</a>: An omni-level unified video generation model built upon HunyuanVideo-1.5, excelling in free-form multimodal composition and reasoning-augmented generation. Specifically, it seamlessly handles a diverse array of tasks, such as Text-to-Video, First-Frame-to-Video, Key-Frames-to-Video, Video-to-Video Editing, Reference-to-Video, Compositional Multi-Image-to-Video, and Text-Image-Video-to-Video.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">📖 Introduction</h2><a id="user-content--introduction" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📖 Introduction" href="#-introduction"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We present HunyuanVideo-1.5, a lightweight yet powerful video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art visual quality and motion coherence with only 8.3 billion parameters, enabling efficient inference on consumer-grade GPUs. This achievement is built upon several key components, including meticulous data curation, an advanced DiT architecture with selective and sliding tile attention(SSTA), enhanced bilingual understanding through glyph-aware text encoding, progressive pre-training and post-training, and an efficient video super-resolution network. Leveraging these designs, we developed a unified framework capable of high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video generation across multiple durations and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this compact and proficient model establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source models. By releasing the code and weights of HunyuanVideo-1.5, we provide the community with a high-performance foundation that significantly lowers the cost of video creation and research, making advanced video generation more accessible to all.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">✨ Key Features</h2><a id="user-content--key-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ✨ Key Features" href="#-key-features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<strong>Lightweight High-Performance Architecture</strong>: We propose an efficient architecture that integrates an 8.3B-parameter Diffusion Transformer (DiT) with a 3D causal VAE, achieving compression ratios of 16× in spatial dimensions and 4× along the temporal axis. Additionally, the innovative SSTA (Selective and Sliding Tile Attention) mechanism prunes redundant spatiotemporal kv blocks, significantly reducing computational overhead for long video sequences and accelerates inference, achieving an end-to-end speedup of <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="49c8c72d9aa5bb72f58713da85a9b959" data-catalyst="">$1.87 \times$</math-renderer> in 10-second 720p video synthesis compared to FlashAttention-3.</li>
</ul>
<div align="center" dir="auto">
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_dit.png"><img src="/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/raw/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_dit.png" alt="HunyuanVideo-1.5 DiT" width="600" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
</div> 
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Video Super-Resolution Enhancement</strong>: We develop an efficient few-step super-resolution network that upscales outputs to 1080p. It enhances sharpness while correcting distortions, thereby refining details and overall visual texture.</li>
</ul>
<div align="center" dir="auto">
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_vsr.png"><img src="/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/raw/main/assets/hy_video_1_5_vsr.png" alt="HunyuanVideo-1.5 VSR" width="600" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
</div> 
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>End-to-End Training Optimization</strong>: This work employs a multi-stage, progressive training strategy covering the entire pipeline from pre-training to post-training. Combined with the Muon optimizer to accelerate convergence, this approach holistically refines motion coherence, aesthetic quality, and human preference alignment, achieving professional-grade content generation.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">📜 System Requirements</h2><a id="user-content--system-requirements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📜 System Requirements" href="#-system-requirements"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Flash Attention:
Install Flash Attention for faster inference and reduced GPU memory consumption.
Detailed installation instructions are available at <a href="https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention">Flash Attention</a>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Flex-Block-Attention:
flex-block-attn is only required for sparse attention to achieve faster inference and can be installed by the following command:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>git clone https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/flex-block-attn.git
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> flex-block-attn
git submodule update --init --recursive
python3 setup.py install</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="git clone https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/flex-block-attn.git
cd flex-block-attn
git submodule update --init --recursive
python3 setup.py install" tabindex="0" role="button">

</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">SageAttention:
To enable SageAttention for faster inference, you need to install it by the following command:</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Note</strong>: Enabling SageAttention will automatically disable Flex-Block-Attention.</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>git clone https://github.com/cooper1637/SageAttention.git
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> SageAttention 
<span class="pl-k">export</span> EXT_PARALLEL=4 NVCC_APPEND_FLAGS=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>--threads 8<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> MAX_JOBS=32 <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Optional</span>
python3 setup.py install</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="git clone https://github.com/cooper1637/SageAttention.git
cd SageAttention 
export EXT_PARALLEL=4 NVCC_APPEND_FLAGS="--threads 8" MAX_JOBS=32 # Optional
python3 setup.py install" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prompt Writing Handbook</h3><a id="user-content-prompt-writing-handbook" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prompt Writing Handbook" href="#prompt-writing-handbook"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Prompt enhancement plays a crucial role in enabling our model to generate high-quality videos. By writing longer and more detailed prompts, the generated video will be significantly improved. We encourage you to craft comprehensive and descriptive prompts to achieve the best possible video quality. We recommend community partners consulting our official guide on how to write effective prompts.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Reference:</strong> <strong><a href="https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5/blob/main/assets/HunyuanVideo_1_5_Prompt_Handbook_EN.md">HunyuanVideo-1.5 Prompt Handbook</a></strong></p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">System Prompts for Automatic Prompt Enhancement</h3><a id="user-content-system-prompts-for-automatic-prompt-enhancement" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: System Prompts for Automatic Prompt Enhancement" href="#system-prompts-for-automatic-prompt-enhancement"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">For users seeking to optimize prompts for other large models, it is recommended to consult the definition of <code>t2v_rewrite_system_prompt</code> in the file <code>hyvideo/utils/rewrite/t2v_prompt.py</code> to guide text-to-video rewriting. Similarly, for image-to-video rewriting, refer to the definition of <code>i2v_rewrite_system_prompt</code> in <code>hyvideo/utils/rewrite/i2v_prompt.py</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔑 Inference</h2><a id="user-content--inference" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔑 Inference" href="#-inference"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Inference with Source Code</h3><a id="user-content-inference-with-source-code" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Inference with Source Code" href="#inference-with-source-code"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">For prompt rewriting, we recommend using Gemini or models deployed via vLLM. This codebase currently only supports models compatible with the vLLM API. If you wish to use Gemini, you will need to implement your own interface calls.</p>
<p dir="auto">For models with a vLLM API, note that T2V (text-to-video) and I2V (image-to-video) have different recommended models and environment variables:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>T2V: use <a href="https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507" rel="nofollow">Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507</a>, configure <code>T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL</code> and <code>T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME</code></li>
<li>I2V: use <a href="https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct" rel="nofollow">Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct</a>, configure <code>I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL</code> and <code>I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME</code></li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto">You may set the above model names to any other vLLM-compatible models you have deployed (including HuggingFace models).<br>
Rewriting is enabled by default (<code>--rewrite</code> defaults to <code>true</code>); to disable it explicitly, use <code>--rewrite false</code> or <code>--rewrite 0</code>. If no vLLM endpoint is configured, the pipeline runs without remote rewriting.</p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">Example: Generate a video (works for both T2V and I2V; set <code>IMAGE_PATH=none</code> for T2V or provide an image path for I2V)</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto">💡 <strong>Tip</strong>: For faster inference speed, you can enable the step-distilled model using the <code>--enable_step_distill</code> parameter. The step-distilled model (480p I2V) can generate videos in 8 or 12 steps (recommended), achieving up to 75% speedup on RTX 4090 while maintaining comparable quality.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Tips:</strong> If your GPU memory is > 14GB but you encounter OOM (Out of Memory) errors during generation, you can try setting the following environment variable before running:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">export</span> PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True,max_split_size_mb:128</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">export</span> T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span><your_vllm_server_base_url><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span><your_model_name><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span><your_vllm_server_base_url><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span><your_model_name><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

PROMPT=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>A girl holding a paper with words "Hello, world!"<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>

IMAGE_PATH=/path/to/image.png <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Optional, none or <image path> to enable i2v mode</span>
SEED=1
ASPECT_RATIO=16:9
RESOLUTION=480p
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/output.mp4
MODEL_PATH=./ckpts <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Path to pretrained model</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Configuration for faster inference</span>
N_INFERENCE_GPU=8 <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Parallel inference GPU count</span>
CFG_DISTILLED=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Inference with CFG distilled model, 2x speedup</span>
SAGE_ATTN=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Inference with SageAttention</span>
SPARSE_ATTN=false <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Inference with sparse attention (only 720p models are equipped with sparse attention). Please ensure flex-block-attn is installed</span>
OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Only valid when group offloading is enabled, significantly increases CPU memory usage but speeds up inference</span>
ENABLE_CACHE=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Enable feature cache during inference. Significantly speeds up inference.</span>
CACHE_TYPE=deepcache <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Support: deepcache, teacache, taylorcache</span>
ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Enable step distilled model for 480p I2V, recommended 8 or 12 steps, up to 6x speedup</span>


<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Configuration for better quality</span>
REWRITE=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Enable prompt rewriting. Please ensure rewrite vLLM server is deployed and configured.</span>
ENABLE_SR=true <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Enable super resolution</span>


torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="pl-smi">$N_INFERENCE_GPU</span> generate.py \
  --prompt <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span><span class="pl-smi">$PROMPT</span><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  --image_path <span class="pl-smi">$IMAGE_PATH</span> \
  --resolution <span class="pl-smi">$RESOLUTION</span> \
  --aspect_ratio <span class="pl-smi">$ASPECT_RATIO</span> \
  --seed <span class="pl-smi">$SEED</span> \
  --rewrite <span class="pl-smi">$REWRITE</span> \
  --cfg_distilled <span class="pl-smi">$CFG_DISTILLED</span> \
  --enable_step_distill <span class="pl-smi">$ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL</span> \
  --sparse_attn <span class="pl-smi">$SPARSE_ATTN</span> --use_sageattn <span class="pl-smi">$SAGE_ATTN</span> \
  --enable_cache <span class="pl-smi">$ENABLE_CACHE</span> --cache_type <span class="pl-smi">$CACHE_TYPE</span> \
  --overlap_group_offloading <span class="pl-smi">$OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING</span> \
  --sr <span class="pl-smi">$ENABLE_SR</span> --save_pre_sr_video \
  --output_path <span class="pl-smi">$OUTPUT_PATH</span> \
  --model_path <span class="pl-smi">$MODEL_PATH</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="export T2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL="<your_vllm_server_base_url>"
export T2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME="<your_model_name>"
export I2V_REWRITE_BASE_URL="<your_vllm_server_base_url>"
export I2V_REWRITE_MODEL_NAME="<your_model_name>"

PROMPT='A girl holding a paper with words "Hello, world!"'

IMAGE_PATH=/path/to/image.png # Optional, none or <image path> to enable i2v mode
SEED=1
ASPECT_RATIO=16:9
RESOLUTION=480p
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/output.mp4
MODEL_PATH=./ckpts # Path to pretrained model

# Configuration for faster inference
N_INFERENCE_GPU=8 # Parallel inference GPU count
CFG_DISTILLED=true # Inference with CFG distilled model, 2x speedup
SAGE_ATTN=true # Inference with SageAttention
SPARSE_ATTN=false # Inference with sparse attention (only 720p models are equipped with sparse attention). Please ensure flex-block-attn is installed
OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=true # Only valid when group offloading is enabled, significantly increases CPU memory usage but speeds up inference
ENABLE_CACHE=true # Enable feature cache during inference. Significantly speeds up inference.
CACHE_TYPE=deepcache # Support: deepcache, teacache, taylorcache
ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL=true # Enable step distilled model for 480p I2V, recommended 8 or 12 steps, up to 6x speedup


# Configuration for better quality
REWRITE=true # Enable prompt rewriting. Please ensure rewrite vLLM server is deployed and configured.
ENABLE_SR=true # Enable super resolution


torchrun --nproc_per_node=$N_INFERENCE_GPU generate.py \
  --prompt "$PROMPT" \
  --image_path $IMAGE_PATH \
  --resolution $RESOLUTION \
  --aspect_ratio $ASPECT_RATIO \
  --seed $SEED \
  --rewrite $REWRITE \
  --cfg_distilled $CFG_DISTILLED \
  --enable_step_distill $ENABLE_STEP_DISTILL \
  --sparse_attn $SPARSE_ATTN --use_sageattn $SAGE_ATTN \
  --enable_cache $ENABLE_CACHE --cache_type $CACHE_TYPE \
  --overlap_group_offloading $OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING \
  --sr $ENABLE_SR --save_pre_sr_video \
  --output_path $OUTPUT_PATH \
  --model_path $MODEL_PATH" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Note:</strong> Use <code>--nproc_per_node</code> to specify the number of GPUs. For example, <code>--nproc_per_node=8</code> uses 8 GPUs.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Usage with Diffusers</h3><a id="user-content-usage-with-diffusers" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Usage with Diffusers" href="#usage-with-diffusers"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">HunyuanVideo-1.5 is available on Hugging Face Diffusers! You can easily use it with the Diffusers library:</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Basic Usage:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">torch</span>

<span class="pl-s1">dtype</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">torch</span>.<span class="pl-c1">bfloat16</span>
<span class="pl-s1">device</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"cuda:0"</span>

<span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">diffusers</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">HunyuanVideo15Pipeline</span>
<span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">diffusers</span>.<span class="pl-s1">utils</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">export_to_video</span>

<span class="pl-s1">pipe</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-v">HunyuanVideo15Pipeline</span>.<span class="pl-c1">from_pretrained</span>(<span class="pl-s">"hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v"</span>, <span class="pl-s1">torch_dtype</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">dtype</span>)
<span class="pl-s1">pipe</span>.<span class="pl-c1">enable_model_cpu_offload</span>()
<span class="pl-s1">pipe</span>.<span class="pl-c1">vae</span>.<span class="pl-c1">enable_tiling</span>()

<span class="pl-s1">generator</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">torch</span>.<span class="pl-c1">Generator</span>(<span class="pl-s1">device</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">device</span>).<span class="pl-c1">manual_seed</span>(<span class="pl-s1">seed</span>)

<span class="pl-s1">video</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">pipe</span>(
    <span class="pl-s1">prompt</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">prompt</span>,
    <span class="pl-s1">generator</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">generator</span>,
    <span class="pl-s1">num_frames</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">121</span>,
    <span class="pl-s1">num_inference_steps</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">50</span>,
).<span class="pl-c1">frames</span>[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>]

<span class="pl-en">export_to_video</span>(<span class="pl-s1">video</span>, <span class="pl-s">"output.mp4"</span>, <span class="pl-s1">fps</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">24</span>)</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="import torch

dtype = torch.bfloat16
device = "cuda:0"

from diffusers import HunyuanVideo15Pipeline
from diffusers.utils import export_to_video

pipe = HunyuanVideo15Pipeline.from_pretrained("hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v", torch_dtype=dtype)
pipe.enable_model_cpu_offload()
pipe.vae.enable_tiling()

generator = torch.Generator(device=device).manual_seed(seed)

video = pipe(
    prompt=prompt,
    generator=generator,
    num_frames=121,
    num_inference_steps=50,
).frames[0]

export_to_video(video, "output.mp4", fps=24)" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Optimized Usage with Attention Backend:</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">HunyuanVideo-1.5 uses attention masks with variable-length sequences. For best performance, we recommend using an attention backend that handles padding efficiently.</p>
<p dir="auto">We recommend installing kernels (<code>pip install kernels</code>) to access prebuilt attention kernels.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">torch</span>

<span class="pl-s1">dtype</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">torch</span>.<span class="pl-c1">bfloat16</span>
<span class="pl-s1">device</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"cuda:0"</span>

<span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">diffusers</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">HunyuanVideo15Pipeline</span>, <span class="pl-s1">attention_backend</span>
<span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">diffusers</span>.<span class="pl-s1">utils</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">export_to_video</span>

<span class="pl-s1">pipe</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-v">HunyuanVideo15Pipeline</span>.<span class="pl-c1">from_pretrained</span>(<span class="pl-s">"hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v"</span>, <span class="pl-s1">torch_dtype</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">dtype</span>)
<span class="pl-s1">pipe</span>.<span class="pl-c1">enable_model_cpu_offload</span>()
<span class="pl-s1">pipe</span>.<span class="pl-c1">vae</span>.<span class="pl-c1">enable_tiling</span>()

<span class="pl-s1">generator</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">torch</span>.<span class="pl-c1">Generator</span>(<span class="pl-s1">device</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">device</span>).<span class="pl-c1">manual_seed</span>(<span class="pl-s1">seed</span>)

<span class="pl-k">with</span> <span class="pl-en">attention_backend</span>(<span class="pl-s">"_flash_3_hub"</span>): <span class="pl-c"># or `"flash_hub"` if you are not on H100/H800</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">video</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">pipe</span>(
        <span class="pl-s1">prompt</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">prompt</span>,
        <span class="pl-s1">generator</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">generator</span>,
        <span class="pl-s1">num_frames</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">121</span>,
        <span class="pl-s1">num_inference_steps</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">50</span>,
    ).<span class="pl-c1">frames</span>[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>]
    <span class="pl-en">export_to_video</span>(<span class="pl-s1">video</span>, <span class="pl-s">"output.mp4"</span>, <span class="pl-s1">fps</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">24</span>)</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="import torch

dtype = torch.bfloat16
device = "cuda:0"

from diffusers import HunyuanVideo15Pipeline, attention_backend
from diffusers.utils import export_to_video

pipe = HunyuanVideo15Pipeline.from_pretrained("hunyuanvideo-community/HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-720p_t2v", torch_dtype=dtype)
pipe.enable_model_cpu_offload()
pipe.vae.enable_tiling()

generator = torch.Generator(device=device).manual_seed(seed)

with attention_backend("_flash_3_hub"): # or `"flash_hub"` if you are not on H100/H800
    video = pipe(
        prompt=prompt,
        generator=generator,
        num_frames=121,
        num_inference_steps=50,
    ).frames[0]
    export_to_video(video, "output.mp4", fps=24)" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🎓 Training</h2><a id="user-content--training" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🎓 Training" href="#-training"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">HunyuanVideo-1.5 is trained using the <strong>Muon optimizer</strong>, which accelerates convergence and improves training stability. The Muon optimizer combines momentum-based updates with Newton-Schulz orthogonalization for efficient optimization of large-scale video generation models.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Quick Start</h3><a id="user-content-quick-start" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Quick Start" href="#quick-start"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The training script (<code>train.py</code>) provides a complete training pipeline for HunyuanVideo-1.5. Here's how to use it:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Implement Your DataLoader</h4><a id="user-content-1-implement-your-dataloader" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Implement Your DataLoader" href="#1-implement-your-dataloader"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Replace the <code>create_dummy_dataloader()</code> function in <code>train.py</code> with your own implementation. Your dataset's <code>__getitem__</code> method should return a single sample.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Required fields:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>"pixel_values"</code>: <code>torch.Tensor</code> - Video: <code>[C, F, H, W]</code> or Image: <code>[C, H, W]</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Pixel values must be in range <code>[-1, 1]</code></li>
<li>Note: For video data, temporal dimension F must be <code>4n+1</code> (e.g., 1, 5, 9, 13, 17, ...)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>"text"</code>: <code>str</code> - Text prompt for this sample</li>
<li><code>"data_type"</code>: <code>str</code> - <code>"video"</code> or <code>"image"</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Optional fields (for performance optimization):</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>"latents"</code>: Pre-encoded VAE latents (skips VAE encoding for faster training)</li>
<li><code>"byt5_text_ids"</code> and <code>"byt5_text_mask"</code>: Pre-tokenized byT5 inputs</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">See the <code>create_dummy_dataloader()</code> function in <code>train.py</code> for detailed format documentation.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Run Training</h4><a id="user-content-2-run-training" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Run Training" href="#2-run-training"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
